title: Performance Marketing Manager*in (m/w/d)
matched_skills: AI tools (ChatGPT / Claude for ad copywriting / asset creation)
missing_skills: Excellent German skills (candidate is B1; JD requires C2-level fluency)
core_responsibilities: Eigenverantwortlicher Aufbau des Performance-Marketing-Bereichs fuer Kunden- und interne Projekte
Konzipierung, Steuerung und Skalierung von Kampagnen ueber Google Ads, Microsoft Advertising und Meta Ads
Data & Tech-Setup: GA4, Looker Studio, Google Tag Manager, BigQuery
KI-Tools fuer Ad-Copywriting, Asset-Kreation und Predictive Audiences proaktiv einsetzen und testen
recommended_emphasis: Highlight GA4 and Looker Studio as primary day-to-day tools with concrete project examples
Emphasise AI-augmented workflows (ChatGPT/Claude for content, asset creation) directly mapping to the KI & Innovation responsibility
Frame the analytics and KPI reporting background as the data foundation needed to optimise bids and budgets
Showcase A/B testing and attribution modelling experience to demonstrate performance optimisation mindset
If any exposure to Google Ads or Meta Ads exists (even indirect), surface it explicitly; otherwise acknowledge the learning curve transparently
Acknowledge German language level honestly; do not overstate fluency
